summary: Frontend-only regression + feature test for Gallery arrows + click-to-enlarge lightbox on Thompson Square Medical Centre landing page. All 21 assertions passed on desktop (1920x900) and mobile (390x844).
critical_code_review_comments: Gallery.jsx: overlay arrows use z-10 while section has overflow-hidden; arrows land correctly INSIDE the relative container mt-12 (not affected). Good.
posRef float accumulator prevents scrollLeft rounding stall — good fix.
Auto-scroll uses direct scrollLeft writes without smooth CSS on the track; nudge() uses behavior:'smooth' but pauseBriefly resyncs after 2500ms — verified working, no jitter observed.
Lightbox correctly stops propagation on inner figure and nav buttons; backdrop click and Escape both close.
Minor: figure onClick sets lightbox even on duplicated items (i>=len) because handler uses idx=i%len which is correct behavior (opens right image). data-testid only set for first 8 — as designed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery arrows (gallery-prev/next) are large 48x48 white circular overlays at left:24px / right ~1848px on desktop and visible on mobile. Auto-scroll increments scrollLeft ~0.6px/frame via rAF and pauses on hover. Lightbox testids: gallery-lightbox, lightbox-prev, lightbox-next, lightbox-close. Caption format: '<alt> · N / 8'. Keyboard ArrowRight/ArrowLeft/Escape and backdrop click all working. 8 gallery items (gallery-item-0..7). No broken images. Doctors section, accepting badge, logo all render fine.
